segment.source: Ask OpenRouter
segment.target: Ask OpenRouter

segment.source: Author(s) : Abdel.
segment.target: Author(s) : Abdel.

segment.source: This NVDA add-on allows you to interact with Artificial Intelligence models provided by the OpenRouter platform directly from your screen reader.
segment.target: This NVDA add-on allows you to interact with Artificial Intelligence models provided by the OpenRouter platform directly from your screen reader.

segment.source: The add-on supports both:
segment.target: The add-on supports both:

segment.source: Automatic random selection of free models
segment.target: Automatic random selection of free models

segment.source: Manual selection of any available model (including paid ones)
segment.target: Manual selection of any available model (including paid ones)

segment.source: Key Features
segment.target: Key Features

segment.source: Quick Access: Open the chat interface anytime with a global shortcut.
segment.target: Quick Access: Open the chat interface anytime with a global shortcut.

segment.source: Conversation Management: Start a fresh conversation or continue your previous exchange.
segment.target: Conversation Management: Start a fresh conversation or continue your previous exchange.

segment.source: Smart Free Model Rotation: Automatically selects a random free model to optimize daily usage quotas.
segment.target: Smart Free Model Rotation: Automatically selects a random free model to optimize daily usage quotas.

segment.source: Manual Model Selection: Choose a specific model (including paid models) from the settings panel.
segment.target: Manual Model Selection: Choose a specific model (including paid models) from the settings panel.

segment.source: Accessible Results: View responses in a clear, easy-to-navigate window with optional full history display.
segment.target: Accessible Results: View responses in a clear, easy-to-navigate window with optional full history display.

segment.source: Configuration: Obtaining and Installing Your API Key
segment.target: Configuration: Obtaining and Installing Your API Key

segment.source: To use this add-on, you must have an API key from OpenRouter.
segment.target: To use this add-on, you must have an API key from OpenRouter.

segment.source: Even when using free models, the key is required to identify your requests.
segment.target: Even when using free models, the key is required to identify your requests.

segment.source: 1. How to get an API key
segment.target: 1. How to get an API key

segment.source: Go to [OpenRouter.ai](https://openrouter.ai/).
segment.target: Go to [OpenRouter.ai](https://openrouter.ai/).

segment.source: Create an account by clicking "Sign up" (you can sign in with a GitHub, Google or MetaMask account, or your email address).
segment.target: Create an account by clicking "Sign up" (you can sign in with a GitHub, Google or MetaMask account, or your email address).

segment.source: Once logged in, navigate to the "Keys" section in your dashboard, or go directly to: https://openrouter.ai/keys
segment.target: Once logged in, navigate to the "Keys" section in your dashboard, or go directly to: https://openrouter.ai/keys

segment.source: Click the "Create Key" button.
segment.target: Click the "Create Key" button.

segment.source: Give your key a name (for example: "My OpenRouter API key") and click "Create".
segment.target: Give your key a name (for example: "My OpenRouter API key") and click "Create".

segment.source: Important: Your key will be displayed only once. Copy it immediately and store it in a secure place.
segment.target: Important: Your key will be displayed only once. Copy it immediately and store it in a secure place.

segment.source: 2. Setting up the key in NVDA
segment.target: 2. Setting up the key in NVDA

segment.source: Open the NVDA menu (NVDA + N).
segment.target: Open the NVDA menu (NVDA + N).

segment.source: Navigate to Preferences, then Settings.
segment.target: Navigate to Preferences, then Settings.

segment.source: In the categories list, select "Ask OpenRouter".
segment.target: In the categories list, select "Ask OpenRouter".

segment.source: Paste your API key into the "OpenRouter API Key" field.
segment.target: Paste your API key into the "OpenRouter API Key" field.

segment.source: Press OK to save.
segment.target: Press OK to save.

segment.source: Show API Key
segment.target: Show API Key

segment.source: In the NVDA settings panel, just after the "OpenRouter API Key" field, there is a checkbox labeled:
segment.target: In the NVDA settings panel, just after the "OpenRouter API Key" field, there is a checkbox labeled:

segment.source: "Show API key"
segment.target: "Show API key"

segment.source: If checked, the characters of the API key become visible.
segment.target: If checked, the characters of the API key become visible.

segment.source: By default, they are hidden for security reasons.
segment.target: By default, they are hidden for security reasons.

segment.source: Model Selection Settings
segment.target: Model Selection Settings

segment.source: In the Ask OpenRouter settings category, you will find a new option:
segment.target: In the Ask OpenRouter settings category, you will find a new option:

segment.source: "Use all models, including paid ones"
segment.target: "Use all models, including paid ones"

segment.source: This option controls how models are selected.
segment.target: This option controls how models are selected.

segment.source: When the option is UNCHECKED (default behavior)
segment.target: When the option is UNCHECKED (default behavior)

segment.source: The add-on automatically selects a random free model for each new conversation.
segment.target: The add-on automatically selects a random free model for each new conversation.

segment.source: It rotates between available free models.
segment.target: It rotates between available free models.

segment.source: This helps distribute usage and avoid rate limits.
segment.target: This helps distribute usage and avoid rate limits.

segment.source: When the option is CHECKED
segment.target: When the option is CHECKED

segment.source: When this option is enabled, a list of available models automatically appears after the checkbox.
segment.target: When this option is enabled, a list of available models automatically appears after the checkbox.

segment.source: The list is sorted in ascending order based on prompt token pricing (cost per input token), from lowest to highest.
segment.target: The list is sorted in ascending order based on prompt token pricing (cost per input token), from lowest to highest.

segment.source: Only non-deprecated models with valid providers are displayed.
segment.target: Only non-deprecated models with valid providers are displayed.

segment.source: What can you do when this option is enabled?
segment.target: What can you do when this option is enabled?

segment.source: Choose any available model.
segment.target: Choose any available model.

segment.source: Use paid models (if you have sufficient OpenRouter credits).
segment.target: Use paid models (if you have sufficient OpenRouter credits).

segment.source: Select the model that best fits your needs.
segment.target: Select the model that best fits your needs.

segment.source: Keep using the same selected model for your conversations (no automatic rotation).
segment.target: Keep using the same selected model for your conversations (no automatic rotation).

segment.source: What is a prompt token?
segment.target: What is a prompt token?

segment.source: A prompt token represents a small unit of text sent to the model (your question or input).
segment.target: A prompt token represents a small unit of text sent to the model (your question or input).

segment.source: Models are usually billed separately for:
segment.target: Models are usually billed separately for:

segment.source: Input tokens (prompt)
segment.target: Input tokens (prompt)

segment.source: Output tokens (completion)
segment.target: Output tokens (completion)

segment.source: How to Use
segment.target: How to Use

segment.source: Opening the Chat Dialog
segment.target: Opening the Chat Dialog

segment.source: Press:
segment.target: Press:

segment.source: Ctrl + Alt + A
segment.target: Ctrl + Alt + A

segment.source: You can change this gesture in:
segment.target: You can change this gesture in:

segment.source: NVDA menu → Preferences → Input Gestures → Ask OpenRouter
segment.target: NVDA menu → Preferences → Input Gestures → Ask OpenRouter

segment.source: Main Interface
segment.target: Main Interface

segment.source: The dialog contains three buttons:
segment.target: The dialog contains three buttons:

segment.source: New Chat – Starts a brand new conversation.
segment.target: New Chat – Starts a brand new conversation.

segment.source: Continue Chat – Resumes the previous conversation (keeps history).
segment.target: Continue Chat – Resumes the previous conversation (keeps history).

segment.source: Close – Closes the dialog (Escape also works).
segment.target: Close – Closes the dialog (Escape also works).

segment.source: Entering Your Prompt
segment.target: Entering Your Prompt

segment.source: After selecting "New Chat" or "Continue Chat":
segment.target: After selecting "New Chat" or "Continue Chat":

segment.source: A multiline text field appears.
segment.target: A multiline text field appears.

segment.source: Pressing Enter inserts a new line.
segment.target: Pressing Enter inserts a new line.

segment.source: To send your message:
segment.target: To send your message:

segment.source: - Press Tab to reach the OK button.
segment.target: - Press Tab to reach the OK button.

segment.source: - Press Enter.
segment.target: - Press Enter.

segment.source: Reading the Response
segment.target: Reading the Response

segment.source: After processing, a results window appears containing:
segment.target: After processing, a results window appears containing:

segment.source: "You said:" followed by your message.
segment.target: "You said:" followed by your message.

segment.source: "The model replied:" followed by the response.
segment.target: "The model replied:" followed by the response.

segment.source: A "Copy" button to copy the response.
segment.target: A "Copy" button to copy the response.

segment.source: If full history display is enabled, each exchange is clearly separated by headings, making it easy to navigate using your NVDA's quick navigation keys.
segment.target: If full history display is enabled, each exchange is clearly separated by headings, making it easy to navigate using your NVDA's quick navigation keys.

segment.source: Display Options
segment.target: Display Options

segment.source: If you prefer to only display the latest response instead of the full conversation history:
segment.target: If you prefer to only display the latest response instead of the full conversation history:

segment.source: Open NVDA menu (NVDA + N).
segment.target: Open NVDA menu (NVDA + N).

segment.source: Go to Preferences → Settings.
segment.target: Go to Preferences → Settings.

segment.source: Select Ask OpenRouter.
segment.target: Select Ask OpenRouter.

segment.source: Uncheck:
segment.target: Uncheck:

segment.source: "Display the full chat history for continuous discussions"
segment.target: "Display the full chat history for continuous discussions"

segment.source: Press OK.
segment.target: Press OK.

segment.source: Unassigned Scripts
segment.target: Unassigned Scripts

segment.source: The following scripts do not have gestures assigned.
segment.target: The following scripts do not have gestures assigned.

segment.source: You can define them in:
segment.target: You can define them in:

segment.source: Preferences → Input Gestures → Ask OpenRouter
segment.target: Preferences → Input Gestures → Ask OpenRouter

segment.source: Available scripts:
segment.target: Available scripts:

segment.source: Open the add-on settings panel
segment.target: Open the add-on settings panel

segment.source: Start a new chat directly
segment.target: Start a new chat directly

segment.source: Continue an existing chat directly
segment.target: Continue an existing chat directly

segment.source: Free Models, Paid Models and Quotas
segment.target: Free Models, Paid Models and Quotas

segment.source: Free Model Usage
segment.target: Free Model Usage

segment.source: When "Use all models, including paid ones" is unchecked:
segment.target: When "Use all models, including paid ones" is unchecked:

segment.source: Only models labeled as free on OpenRouter are used.
segment.target: Only models labeled as free on OpenRouter are used.

segment.source: Free models have:
segment.target: Free models have:

segment.source: - Limited daily quotas
segment.target: - Limited daily quotas

segment.source: - Shared rate limits
segment.target: - Shared rate limits

segment.source: - Possible temporary unavailability
segment.target: - Possible temporary unavailability

segment.source: The add-on automatically rotates between free models to improve availability.
segment.target: The add-on automatically rotates between free models to improve availability.

segment.source: Paid Model Usage
segment.target: Paid Model Usage

segment.source: When "Use all models, including paid ones" is checked:
segment.target: When "Use all models, including paid ones" is checked:

segment.source: The add-on uses the exact model you selected.
segment.target: The add-on uses the exact model you selected.

segment.source: This may include paid models.
segment.target: This may include paid models.

segment.source: You must have sufficient OpenRouter credits.
segment.target: You must have sufficient OpenRouter credits.

segment.source: Provider rate limits may apply.
segment.target: Provider rate limits may apply.

segment.source: Errors such as:
segment.target: Errors such as:

segment.source: 402 (insufficient credits)
segment.target: 402 (insufficient credits)

segment.source: 429 (rate limited)
segment.target: 429 (rate limited)

segment.source: 404 (model not allowed by privacy settings)
segment.target: 404 (model not allowed by privacy settings)

segment.source: are displayed directly to inform you of the issue.
segment.target: are displayed directly to inform you of the issue.

segment.source: Privacy Settings Reminder
segment.target: Privacy Settings Reminder

segment.source: If you use free models and receive an error mentioning:
segment.target: If you use free models and receive an error mentioning:

segment.source: > "No endpoints found matching your data policy"
segment.target: > "No endpoints found matching your data policy"

segment.source: You may need to adjust your OpenRouter privacy settings:
segment.target: You may need to adjust your OpenRouter privacy settings:

segment.source: https://openrouter.ai/settings/privacy
segment.target: https://openrouter.ai/settings/privacy

segment.source: Ensure that public/free model endpoints are allowed.
segment.target: Ensure that public/free model endpoints are allowed.

segment.source: Compatibility ##
segment.target: Compatibility ##

segment.source: This add-on is compatible with the versions of NVDA ranging from 2025.1 and beyond.
segment.target: This add-on is compatible with the versions of NVDA ranging from 2025.1 and beyond.

segment.source: Changes for 20260221.0.0
segment.target: Changes for 20260221.0.0

segment.source: Added manual selection of any available model from the settings panel
segment.target: Added manual selection of any available model from the settings panel

segment.source: Added ability to use paid models
segment.target: Added ability to use paid models

segment.source: Changes for 20260217.0.0
segment.target: Changes for 20260217.0.0

segment.source: Initial version
segment.target: Initial version
